plate_not_empty.name: Plate Not Empty
plate_not_empty.body_template: {printer}: Objects detected on build plate. Print has been paused. Clear plate and resume.

test.name: Test Notification
test.body_template: This is a test notification. If you see this, notifications are working!

user_created.name: Welcome Email

password_reset.name: Password Reset

stock_reorder_alert.name: Stock Reorder Alert
stock_reorder_alert.body_template:
{material} ({brand}) has reached the reorder point.
Stock: {stock_g}g | Rate: {rate_g_day}g/day | Days left: {days_left}d
Reorder now to avoid a stock break.

stock_break_alert.name: Stock Break Alert
stock_break_alert.body_template:
{material} ({brand}) will run out before replenishment arrives.
Stock: {stock_g}g | Rate: {rate_g_day}g/day | Lead time: {lead_time_days}d
Only {days_left}d of stock remaining — order immediately.

user_print_start.name: User Print Started
user_print_start.body_template:
Hello {username},

Your print job has started on {printer}.

File: {filename}

You will be notified when it completes.

user_print_complete.name: User Print Completed

user_print_failed.name: User Print Failed

user_print_stopped.name: User Print Stopped
